text:
# Part 12 — Children Proceedings except Parental Order Proceedings and Proceedings for Applications in Adoption, Placement and Related Proceedings

## PART 12 E+W [ F1 CHILDREN PROCEEDINGS ] EXCEPT PARENTAL ORDER PROCEEDINGS AND PROCEEDINGS FOR APPLICATIONS IN ADOPTION, PLACEMENT AND RELATED PROCEEDINGS


Textual Amendments


F1 Words in Pt. 12 heading substituted (31.1.2013) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) (No.5) Rules 2012 (S.I. 2012/3061) , rules 1 , 5(a)


### CHAPTER 1 E+W INTERPRETATION AND APPLICATION OF THIS PART


### Application of this Part E+W


12.1. —(1) The rules in this Part apply to—


(Part 18 sets out the procedure for making an application for permission to bring proceedings.) (Part 31 sets out the procedure for making applications for recognition and enforcement of judgments under F3 ... the 1996 Hague Convention.)


(2) The rules in Chapter 7 of this Part also apply to family proceedings which are not within paragraph (1) but which otherwise relate wholly or mainly to the maintenance or upbringing of a minor.


[ F4 (3) This Part is subject to any provision made by or pursuant to Part 41 (proceeding by electronic means). ]


Textual Amendments


F2 Words in rule 12.1(1)(f) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 9(2)(a) (with reg. 23 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(b) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)
